Maria Clara, we have a lot of things to prepare for Seoul. How much preparation do we still have, and how much time?
We have a little time, about six weeks. But there are too many meetings before November.
And how many documents do we need for the delegation?
We need a lot of documents. Each person needs a visa, and a few of them are still not ready.
And the budget? Do we have enough money for the flights?
We have enough for the flights, but only a little foreign currency for the hotel. I am going to check the amount.
Good. And do we have enough seats on the same flight?
Not many seats are left, so book them today. There is a lot of preparation, but I am looking forward to Seoul!

Hi Maria Clara, it is Bruno. A quick update on the Seoul trip before you call me back. First, the time. We have a little time, about six weeks, but honestly there are too many meetings in October, so we need to start now. Second, the documents. We need a lot of documents for the delegation: passports, visas, and the invitation letters. A few visas are still not ready, so please talk to the embassy this week. Third, the money. We have enough budget for the flights, but not much foreign currency for the hotel and the meals, so we need to plan the amount carefully. And the seats. There are not many seats left on our flight, only eight, so we have to book them today. That is it. We do not have much time, but we have enough resources. Talk soon.

Good afternoon. This is a short message from the institutional travel office about the delegation to Seoul in November. Please read it before the next meeting. First, the documents. Every member of the delegation needs a valid passport and a visa. We need a lot of documents, so send them to us as soon as possible. We do not have much time. Second, the budget. Each member has a fixed amount for the trip. There is enough money for the flights and the hotel, but only a little for extra expenses, so please keep your receipts. Third, the seats. We have a limited number of seats on the official flight, so not many people can change the date. And finally, the preparation. There is a lot of preparation before departure, and too many changes make it difficult for everyone. Please confirm your information by Friday. Thank you.
